title: delissea fauriei
intro: Delissea fauriei, also known as Korean mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant in the heath family that is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of polyphenols and flavonoids. Drinking Delissea fauriei tea has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Delissea fauriei is prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves in hot water or extracting them with a solvent, and is often consumed to promote overall well-being and longevity.
